trivia_bullets.text: Entourage of Trest was first printed in Conspiracy: Take the Crown (CN2, August 2016), a multiplayer draft set on the plane of Fiora. 'Trest' is a spy and mercenary organization on Fiora; Leovold, Emissary of Trest (the flavor-text speaker) is the faction's legendary elf Advisor and one of CN2's featured legends.

"The dim resort to violence, for which the nimble prepare." — Leovold, emissary of Trest. Leovold's own card has the ability 'Each opponent can't draw more than one card each turn' — an information-control ability fitting his intelligence-operative identity. The flavor text positions his guards as preparation against those who lack his cunning.

The Monarch keyword mechanic was introduced in Conspiracy: Take the Crown (2016), designed specifically for multiplayer games. Entourage of Trest was one of the original Monarch-granting creatures in CN2. Commander Legends (CMR, 2020) marked the Monarch's first appearance in a booster-draft Commander product, making reprints like this card key to the mechanic's wider distribution.
sources: magic.wizards.com: Conspiracy: Take the Crown Mechanics, 2016-08-15

trivia_bullets.text: A 4/4 for five mana that crowns you Monarch on entry and blocks an additional creature while you hold the title. EDHREC rank 16335. Its value is tied to the Monarch engine — it synergizes with any card that rewards being the Monarch (Court of Grace, Palace Jailer) but asks you to defend the title, which the multi-block ability directly supports.
